rows.notes: Top-centre page title; very clear handwriting and no monetary amount in the title line. Vertical ruling lines not needed for this header.

Description legible but some letters ambiguous (reads as 'Southamdrington' / 'Southam...'). Amount at far right is faint and small; interpreted as '2 - 5 - 2' by alignment with the three right-hand ruling lines and comparison with clearer totals below. Because the description and small digits are both somewhat faint, confidence reduced.
rows.english_description: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at the annual feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at the annual feast, amounting to £2 5s 2d.

rows.notes: Short description (dash then 'ad fest Michl') clearly visible. Amount '10 - 0 - 0' is well aligned under the pounds column and digits are crisp; shillings/pence zeroes are clear.
rows.english_description: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at Michaelmas, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: A second identical line (dash then 'ad fest Michl'). Amount reads '10 - 0 - 0' similar to the prior row. Slight ink fade compared with previous line but column alignment is clear so reading is reliable.
rows.english_description: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the vicar of Southamdrington at Michaelmas, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Plate Excise' is clear. Amount '5 - 15 - 0' is crisply written and aligns perfectly with the pounds/shillings/pence ruling columns.
rows.english_description: Excise duty relating to the college plate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Excise duty relating to the college plate, amounting to £5 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Clear description and amount '0 - 5 - 0' well aligned. No ambiguity in digits.
rows.english_description: Postage for letters and miscellaneous postal expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Postage for letters and miscellaneous postal expenses, amounting to £0 5s 0d.

rows.description: Pauperibus (general Collection for ye Poor Jersey 1769.)
rows.notes: Description mostly legible though 'Pauperibus' / 'general collection' require pale reading; amount '3 - 3 - 0' is clear and aligned. Year '1769' visible in parentheses.
rows.english_description: Alms distributed to the poor from the general Jersey collection of 1769.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Alms distributed to the poor from the general Jersey collection of 1769, amounting to £3 3s 0d.

rows.notes: Centered section header introducing the next group. Handwriting clear though Latin abbreviation 'Dno' (Domino) and 'Scholariis' are old-style; no amounts present.
Description reads as 'Apendium' (spelling variable in manuscript). Amount '18 - 6 - 8' is legible; column alignment clear. Some letters in description slightly faded, hence confidence < 1.0.
rows.english_description: An allowance (appendium) paid to the rector/scholars/officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: An allowance (appendium) paid to the rector, scholars, or officers, amounting to £18 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Description 'pro augment. South New: & Merton' reasonably clear (some abbreviations). Amount '24 - 0 - 0' clear and aligned with pounds column.
rows.english_description: Payment for augmentation for South Newington and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for augmentation for South Newington and Merton, amounting to £24 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Description is abbreviated and partly uncertain ('Dno flicus' reconstructed from manuscript). Amount '33 - 6 - 8' is readable but ink slightly blotchy on the shillings/pence; column boundaries were used to confirm each digit.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to a clergyman (recipient not specified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to a clergyman (recipient not specified), amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Description 'Divid: Dna flicus' (abbreviated) visible. Amount '50 - 0 - 0' is written clearly with strong strokes, alignment consistent with other rows.
rows.english_description: Dividend paid to the named recipient (name unclear in the entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend paid to the named recipient (name unclear in the entry), amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Single-word description 'Stipend' is clear. Amount '31 - 0 - 0' clearly written and validated against ruling lines.
rows.english_description: A stipend payment to an officer, scholar, or similar college recipient (unspecified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: A stipend payment to an officer, scholar, or similar college recipient (unspecified), amounting to £31 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Bracketed description '(pro 3a parte Kidling: augment.)' reasonably legible though some letters ambiguous. Amount '22 - 0 - 10' is clear; pence '10' validated as <=11.
rows.english_description: Payment representing the third part of the Kidlington augmentation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment representing the third part of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £22 0s 10d.

rows.notes: Another 'Stipend' line; amount '19 - 0 - 0' clear and well aligned.
rows.english_description: A stipend payment to an officer, scholar, or similar college recipient (unspecified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: A stipend payment to an officer, scholar, or similar college recipient (unspecified), amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Bracketed description for a 4th part augment; letters slightly cramped but readable. Amount '11 - 5 - 5' is legible; all currency components pass validation.
rows.english_description: Payment representing the fourth part of the Kidlington augmentation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment representing the fourth part of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £11 5s 5d.

rows.notes: Description similar to earlier 'Stipend Dno flicus' but ink heavier here; amount reads '35 - 6 - 8'. Slight variability in handwriting makes the first digit (3) and subsequent digits clear but description abbreviation uncertain.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to a clergyman (recipient not specified).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to a clergyman (recipient not specified), amounting to £35 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Second occurrence of 'Divid: Dna flicus'. Amount '50 - 0 - 0' clear and matches earlier similar line; alignment strong.
rows.english_description: Dividend paid to the named recipient (name unclear in the entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend paid to the named recipient (name unclear in the entry), amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Bracketed description '(Pro augment: Longwith.)' legible. Amount reads '27 - 19 - 0' with a small handwritten fractional mark after the pence that matches a three‑farthings symbol (looks like '3q' or a handwritten '¾'); interpreted as 0.75 (three farthings). The fraction is faint but consistent with the final page total fraction.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for augmentation for Longwith, amounting to £27 19s 0.75d.

rows.notes: Bracketed 'Pro augment Gwinear' (spelling possibly 'Gwinear') readable. Amount '24 - 10 - 0' clear and aligns well with ruling columns.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for augmentation for Gwinear, amounting to £24 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Final total marked with a stylised 'L:' (pound sign). Amount reads '375 - 19 - 0' with the same three‑farthings (¾) fractional mark after the pence as seen above; alignment of the total with the three ruling lines is good and confirms earlier row fractions. All components validated (shillings <20, pence whole <=11).
